# ananicy-rules-generator

JSON game rules for [ananicy-cpp](https://github.com/kuchejak/ananicy-cpp) / [CachyOS/ananicy-rules](https://github.com/CachyOS/ananicy-rules): SteamSpy → SQLite → Steam PICS → `generate`.

**`generate` stdout:** `## Autogenerated` · `## Overridden` (`generate_conf.yaml`) · `## No automatic rules`.  
Config: [`generate_conf.yaml`](generate_conf.yaml) — `filters`, `overrides` (replaces autogen per appid; `.exe` → Wine). `--config path`.

```sh
npm install
npx tsx src/index.ts fetch-spy          # ~1 page/min; optional: start page
npx tsx src/index.ts fetch-pics
npx tsx src/index.ts generate [--min-reviews N] [--top-weekly N] [--config path]
```

Scripts (needs `.vendor/ananicy-rules`): `node scripts/compare-vendor-generated.mjs [out.txt]` · `node scripts/diff-to-overrides.mjs diff.txt generate_conf.yaml`

Docker: `docker build -t ananicy-rules .` — mount `./data`, entrypoint `npx tsx src/index.ts`.
